champion.name: Figure 02
champion.reason: Completed an 11-month deployment at BMW's Spartanburg plant — the longest publicly documented humanoid factory deployment. Loaded 90,000+ parts, contributed to 30,000+ BMW X3 vehicles.
champion.latestUpdate: Figure 03 announced, F02 retired from BMW — Nov 2025

champion.name: Atlas (Electric)
champion.reason: Production version unveiled at CES 2026. 30+ years of R&D distilled into an all-electric platform with superhuman range of motion, 56 DoF, and IP67 durability. 2026 production fully committed.
champion.latestUpdate: Production-ready version launched at CES — Jan 2026

champion.name: Galbot G1
champion.reason: Powered by billion-scale manipulation datasets and end-to-end embodied AI models (GraspVLA, GroceryVLA). 1000+ industrial units shipped. Runs 24/7 autonomous retail stores.
champion.latestUpdate: GroceryVLA model released for retail applications — 2025

champion.name: 小布米 (XiaobuMi)
champion.reason: Priced at ¥9,998 (~$1,370), breaking the price floor for consumer humanoid robots. Crowdfunded and shipped to early backers.
champion.latestUpdate: First batch shipped to crowdfund backers — 2025

champion.name: Spot
champion.reason: The gold standard for enterprise quadrupeds — proven in power plants, construction sites, and hazardous environments. Autonomous inspection at industrial scale.
champion.latestUpdate: Continued fleet expansion across energy sector — 2025

champion.name: π₀ (Pi-Zero)
champion.reason: A generalist robot foundation model that controls multiple robot types across diverse tasks — folding laundry, bussing tables, assembling boxes — from a single neural network. The GPT moment for robotics.
champion.latestUpdate: Raised $400M Series A at $2B valuation — Nov 2024

champion.name: N2 小顽童
champion.reason: Runner-up at the world's first humanoid robot half-marathon (Beijing Yizhuang, 2025). First humanoid to perform continuous backflips across indoor and outdoor environments.
champion.latestUpdate: Appeared on CCTV Spring Festival Gala — Feb 2026

champion.name: MagicBot Z1
champion.reason: AI-powered emotion sensing via voice and facial expression analysis. Can respond to human gestures and emotional states in real-time. Deployed in unmanned café, tea shop, and pharmacy scenarios.
champion.latestUpdate: 16 units performed on CCTV Spring Festival Gala — Feb 2026
